arts.ttl: Arsenal get fresh incentive to complete money-spinning Benjamin Sesko transfer NOW
arts.sum: The Gunners have a list of targets that they are monitoring heading into the summer transfer window, but their need for a proven goalscorer could speed things up

arts.ttl: Official | RB Leipzig confirm permanent capture of Arthur Vermeeren: “Very comfortable in Leipzig from day one.”
arts.sum: RB Leipzig have confirmed the permanent purchase of Belgian midfielder Arthur Vermeeren.

arts.ttl: 'I've played with Man Utd star and La Liga goal machine - Benjamin Sesko is best I've seen'
arts.sum: Talk of RB Leipzig striker Benjamin Sesko moving to the Premier League is intensifying, with Arsenal, Chelsea and Manchester United all monitoring the Slovenian closely

arts.ttl: Bochum vs. RB Leipzig: Can the hosts claim a third consecutive home victory?
arts.sum: Bochum will look to record a third consecutive home win when they welcome RB Leipzig to the Vonovia Ruhrstadion on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Arthur Vermeeren makes RB Leipzig move permanent
arts.sum: RB Leipzig have announced the permanent signing of Belgian midfielder Arthur Vermeeren (19) from Atlético Madrid.

arts.ttl: Benjamin Sesko's agent finally reveals truth behind Arsenal transfer rumours
arts.sum: Benjamin Sesko has been heavily linked with a move to Arsenal but the RB Leipzig star's agent has poured water on any rumours of a January loan switch to the Gunners

arts.ttl: Sesko agent breaks silence over Arsenal rumours with clear message
arts.sum: Benjamin Sesko ’s agent has broken his silence around the player’s potential January transfer to Arsenal from RB Leipzig. Previously, Romano stated that it would take a “crazy” bid from Arsenal to allow them to buy Sesko during the January transfer window, and writing for GMS, he adds that the €60-65 million price tag being put on the player is unlikely to tempt RB Leipzig into a sale at this juncture.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano transfer news: Sesko GUARANTEE, Neymar SURPRISE, Rashford OPTIONS
arts.sum: Football transfer news reporter Fabrizio Romano has given the latest on the biggest transfer stories of the day, from Arsenal ’s interest in Benjamin Sesko, to Marcus Rashford leaving Manchester United and an astonishing twist in Neymar’s future. Neymar has sensationally been snubbed by Al-Hilal, with the Saudi Pro League club refusing to register him for the second half of the season, leaving the Brazil international, who is out of contract in the summer, in limbo.

arts.ttl: Preview: VfL Bochum vs. RB Leipzig - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between VfL Bochum and RB Leipzig, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Sources: What RB Leipzig are saying about Arsenal and Benjamin Sesko amid reports of transfer talks
arts.sum: TBR Football have received information from RB Leipzig sources on Benjamin Sesko amid rumours claiming Arsenal have held talks over the striker. Arsenal are currently...
